prompt: A young boy sits on a light brown chair in an outdoor setting, enjoying a burger. The video is captured in a medium shot at eye level, focusing on the boy who is wearing a gray T-shirt with colorful text across the chest. He looks down toward the bottom of the frame, appearing engaged with his meal. A glass railing stretches along the right side of the frame, and another individual is sitting on the boy's right, with their left arm visible in the frame.  In the next moment, the boy brings a burger close to his mouth from the center-bottom of the frame, holding it with both hands and taking a bite. The person off the frame to the left puts their hand on his back, and the boy then puts the burger down, shifting his gaze toward the camera while chewing. He looks slightly to the left of the frame and brings his right hand in a closed fist to his mouth. A jump cut occurs, and the clip resumes with the same shot and angle, showing the boy's hand near his mouth as he continues to chew and smile. He then puts both of his hands in fists in the air before bringing them close to his mouth while smiling. He begins to talk, making an open-handed gesture with the back of both hands facing the lower left and right corners of the frame. Another jump cut follows, and the boy continues to talk, making a pointing gesture toward the camera with his right hand. He looks to the right and then the left of the frame while doing this.  The background is blurred, showing an outdoor seating area with some greenery, and the environment is urban, with tall buildings faintly visible in the distance on the right side of the frame. An overcast sky is visible, and the camera remains static throughout. The lighting is bright, with soft natural light illuminating the surroundings.
